subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto those who have attained true knowledge, on a Day when all have turned away therefrom, save whom God willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فاز بالعرفان فی یوم اعرض عنه العباد الا من شاء الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
